sc.political.s: FEC disclosures 2020-2024 show ~55% Republican, ~45% Democratic recipient allocation.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement actions or named pollution events documented; Scope 1+2 emissions disclosed but no science-based targets verified.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings, OSHA fatalities, or class-action settlements ≥$1M on public record.
sc.charity.s: No public record of named charitable programs with disclosed dollar amounts ≥1% of revenue.
sc.animals.s: Automotive manufacturing does not involve animal testing or animal-derived products.
sc.guns.s: Manufactures vehicles; does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: Not applicable to automotive manufacturing; vehicle data collection practices not evaluated.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio not publicly disclosed by Stellantis.

charity.focus: Education, community development, digital divide programs

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
